```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Blue Carbon ecosystems can sequester five times more carbon than tropical rainforests.",
    "Blue Carbon ecosystems store 50 times more carbon in their surrounding soil compared to other habitats.",
    "California has lost over 90 percent of its historical wetlands, reducing their associated benefits.",
    "Most blue carbon habitats in California are found as tidal salt marshes and seagrasses.",
    "AB 45 allows the California Coastal Commission to add carbon sequestration as a factor in designing mitigation projects.",
    "AB 45 permits the approval of new blue carbon mitigation banks in California.",
    "AB 45 requires data collection on blue carbon projects to demonstrate their potential for removing greenhouse gases.",
    "AB 45 aims to add to the growing research in the field of blue carbon through monitoring of permitted projects."
  ]
```
